Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to generate a response that identifies anomalies in the event log data and proposes SQL queries to investigate

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The user gave a schema sample data and a prompt The prompt says The target model should be encouraged to Identify anomalies and undesirable behaviors in the given event log Hypothesize why these anomalies might occur and Propose relevant SQL queries So I need to act as the target LLM and output a response that does that

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1001 activities in correct order Register Order Perform Credit Check Validate Stock Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Issue Invoice Receive Payment Fine

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 activities Register Order Confirm Shipment early before credit check and stock validation Ship Goods Perform Credit Check Validate Stock Issue Invoice Receive Payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomalies Confirm Shipment and Ship Goods happen before credit check and stock validation That is a major out of order execution likely policy violation

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Additional info for Confirm Shipment attempted early Y indicating someone attempted early shipment Possibly a deliberate bypass

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 activities Register Order Perform Credit Check Ship Goods Issue Invoice Confirm Shipment Receive Payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Missing Perform Credit Check Validate Stock Payment received before invoice issued Normally issue invoice then receive payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Could be a prepayment scenario but still deviations from normal process

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Overall anomalies across cases out of order execution shipment before credit check payment before invoice missing activities credit check stock validation and attempted early and late confirmation flags

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: These could indicate process violations system workarounds fraud or training issues

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deliberate policy violation maverick behavior resources bypassing checks to expedite shipment for example LogisticsMgr 2 in case 1002 confirmed shipment early with attempted early Y This might be to meet delivery KPIs

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: System error or UI issues allowing actions before dependencies

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Training issues where employees not following correct sequence

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Fraud case 1004 payment before invoice might be fraudulent pre collection or missing credit check could indicate collusion

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Missing stock validation in cases 1003 and 1004 might be due to known stock levels or override but still deviation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Case 1002 is priority order maybe they allow early shipment But still should perform credit check Yet shipment happened before credit check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: They did credit check later so it was not skipped just late So it is still anomalous

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: To investigate I will propose SQL queries Detect cases where activity order deviates from normal sequence Check cases missing mandatory activities Look for patterns with attempted early or late confirmation and correlate with resource role Check if certain resources are repeatedly involved in out of order activities Check order type priority versus standard

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For each case get the minimum timestamps of certain activities and compare those where timestamp of a later expected step is earlier than an earlier step

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Cases missing mandatory activities like Perform Credit Check Validate Stock and others can be checked by seeing whether activity entries exist per case

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Resources involved in early shipment confirmations can be investigated using additional info fields and joined to resources for role and department

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Cases with payment before invoice can be found by comparing earliest Receive Payment and Issue Invoice timestamps per case

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Frequency of missing steps by order type or by resource might be interesting
